context: Tile-prescribed reasoning: when a company runs X-on-X (uses its own product internally) AND publishes an external API, the consume-mode top target is the X-on-X surface with task_shape=USE and size_class=majority — NOT the external API surface (which is INTEGRATE/external for the booth audience). Baseline agents tend to surface the public API since it's the most visible.

checklist.name: Verdict is BUILD
checklist.description: verdict=BUILD with at least one target at confidence >= 0.5.

checklist.name: Top target task_shape is USE
checklist.description: The highest booth-aha-scoring target has task_shape=USE (NOT INTEGRATE, NOT AUTHOR). The X-on-X daily-use surface beats the external API.

checklist.name: Top target size_class is majority
checklist.description: target_population.size_class=majority. The whole engineering org touches the X-on-X surface daily, not just a small platform team.

checklist.name: internal_usage anchor is confirmed or inferred
checklist.description: Top target's internal_usage_surface maps to an internal_usage entry with level=confirmed or level=inferred (not weak, not none).

checklist.name: External API is not top
checklist.description: The external/public API surface is NOT the highest-ranked target. If it appears at all, it is task_shape=INTEGRATE with size_class=external, ranked below the X-on-X target.

checklist.name: Validator passes
checklist.description: The persisted JSON validates against the discovery-output-contract.md schema (required fields present, verdict in allowed set, cross-references resolve).
